The trace exhibits several issues, including agents ignoring each other's input, repeating the same information, disobeying task specifications (like providing incomplete code), and prematurely terminating tasks. There are also instances of action-reasoning mismatches and a lack of robust verification. The navigator sometimes provides simplified implementations instead of the actual code. There are also instances of conversation resets and loss of context.
